calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-24-2014 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (166 Williams Avenue, San Francisco Ca 94124)
Off Calendar May-15-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Carolyn Brazington.

The Court noted that it received the re-appraisal for sale that was filed yesterday. The sale was confirmed at $555,001.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed April 22, 2014. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Jones. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Granted Per Written Order
